diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

 import torch.nn.functional as F

-from torch_geometric.nn import GINEConv, global_mean_pool

+from torch_geometric.nn import global_mean_pool

 

 class GINMultiTask(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, in_channels=9, edge_attr_dim=3, hidden_dim=128, num_layers=3, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.2):

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
         self.dropout = dropout

         self.node_embedding = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_dim)

         self.edge_embedding = nn.Linear(edge_attr_dim, hidden_dim)

+        from torch_geometric.nn import GINEConv

         self.convs = nn.ModuleList()

         self.bns = nn.ModuleList()

         for _ in range(num_layers):

@@ -32,8 +33,28 @@
             x_new = F.relu(x_new)

             if self.dropout > 0:

                 x_new = F.dropout(x_new, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

-            x = x + x_new  # residual

+            x = x + x_new

         x = global_mean_pool(x, batch)

         x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training) if self.dropout > 0 else x

         x = self.lin(x)

-        return x  # logits

+        return x

+

+class SimpleMLP(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=9, hidden_dim=128, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.2):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.node_embedding = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_dim)

+        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+        )

+        self.lin = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_tasks)

+

+    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr, batch):

+        x = self.node_embedding(x.float())

+        x = self.mlp(x)

+        x = global_mean_pool(x, batch)

+        x = self.lin(x)

+        return x

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

@@ -15,14 +15,12 @@
 

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

 

-    # Load test data

     test_data = torch.load(os.path.join(args.data_path, 'test.pt'), weights_only=True)

     nf = test_data['node_features']

     ei = test_data['edge_index']

     ea = test_data['edge_attr']

     num_graphs = len(nf)

 

-    # Build dataset without labels

     class TestDataset(torch.utils.data.Dataset):

         def __init__(self, nf, ei, ea):

             self.nf = nf

@@ -36,9 +34,13 @@
     dataset = TestDataset(nf, ei, ea)

     loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=False, num_workers=0, pin_memory=False)

 

-    # Load model

-    model = GINMultiTask(hidden_dim=128)

-    model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device, weights_only=True))

+    ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device, weights_only=True)

+    arch = ckpt.get('arch', 'simple')

+    if arch == 'gine':

+        model = GINMultiTask(hidden_dim=128)

+    else:

+        model = SimpleMLP(hidden_dim=128)

+    model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()
